rulings.Case Title: RICHTER VS UNITED RENTALS NORTHWEST INC
rulings.Rulings: FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF CFRA: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE COMPARABLE EMPLOYMENT. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF FEHA: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF FEHA - HARASSMENT - DEFENDANT SHIFTED BURDEN. HEARING REQUIRED ON 437C(H) REQUEST. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL TERMINATION/CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE INTOLERABLE CONDITION. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT - GRANT. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION: DENY. THERE IS A VALID FEHA CLAIM. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION DEFAMATION: GRANT. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Dismissing Plaintiff'S Complaint In Its Entirety
rulings.Rulings: GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 10 DAYS TO AMEND. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES DENIED, FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF RE: REASONABLENESS OF FEES AND HOURLY RATE. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: INSUR COMM OF CALIF VS GOLDEN EAGLE INS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Claimants Verified Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust To Dismiss Claims And Allegations And For Other Relief

rulings.Rulings: CHEVRON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. CHEVRON'S ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR GENERAL NEGLIGENCE AND THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL TORT, AS NO TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT ARE PRESENTED. MOTION DENIED AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PRODUCTS LIABILITY. THAT CAUSE OF ACTION, AS PLED, IS NOT LIMITED TO THE FAILURE TO WARN THEORY. FAILURE TO SUSTAIN INITIAL BURDEN. (JH)
